## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Testing

Explain how the change was tested, including relevant hardware, software, or environment details.

## Notes

Call out limitations, risks, compatibility concerns, screenshots, logs, or follow-up work.

## Checklist

- [ ] The change is focused and does not include unrelated work.
- [ ] I tested the affected behavior where practical.
- [ ] I updated documentation when behavior or setup changed.
- [ ] I did not include secrets, credentials, personal data, or private infrastructure details.
